description: Transform the input point before evaluating the SDF: translate, rotate, scale, elongate.

functions.name: opRotateX/Y/Z
functions.definition: Apply rotation matrix to p around given axis

functions.name: opElongate
functions.definition: Clamp coordinates to stretch shape along axes

art_failure_modes: Non-uniform scale breaks SDF distance guarantees — use elongation instead.
Forgetting to multiply by scale factor after division corrupts distance field.
Rotation matrices must be orthogonal or distance estimates break.
